executives.name: Duane Lo
executives.background: Mr. Lo is a senior financial executive with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the CFO of Entrée Resources Ltd. and Luna Gold Corp. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

executives.name: Peter Meredith
executives.background: Mr. Meredith has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry and was previously the CFO of Ivanhoe Mines Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Meredith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Meredith has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry and was previously the CFO of Ivanhoe Mines Ltd.
